message:
fix(mux): re-send cursor state on surface resize to fix stale coordinates

When a panel's surface resizes (e.g., after a split), SURFACE_DIMS was
sent with updated dimensions but CURSOR_STATE was only re-sent when
the cursor's grid col/row changed. This left the client with stale
pixel coordinates computed against the old surface layout, causing the
cursor to appear at wrong scale and position until the user typed.
